message:
feat(gen_server): add supervised named-start helper with deterministic cleanup (bd-1hvy1)

Introduce NamedGenServerStart adapter that acquires name leases from the
registry and starts GenServers under supervision. Uses scope.defer_sync()
for deterministic finalization — leases and names are cleaned up on region
stop or crash, preventing registry pollution from orphaned entries.

- NamedGenServerStart<S, F> struct implementing supervision::ChildStart
- named_gen_server_start() constructor function
- New SpawnError::NameRegistrationFailed variant for deterministic failure reporting
- Re-export in spork::gen_server and spork::prelude modules
- Comprehensive tests: normal shutdown cleanup and post-crash cleanup paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
